description_long: This is a modern dining chair with a tall, rectangular backrest and a wide, flat seat, both upholstered in dark brown leather or leather-like material. The seat and backrest are padded, providing comfort and a sleek, contemporary appearance. The chair stands on four straight, slightly tapered wooden legs finished in a medium brown tone, giving it a sturdy and stable base. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, with no visible stitching or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist design. The backrest is fully covered and extends vertically from the seat, offering ample support for the back. This chair is suitable for use in dining rooms, cafes, or waiting areas in urban environments.
description: A modern, dark brown leather-upholstered dining chair with a tall backrest and four wooden legs, featuring a minimalist and comfortable design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall, rectangular backrest and wide, padded seat with two front wooden legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the padded seat and backrest, as well as the straight alignment of the front and rear legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the fully upholstered backrest and both rear wooden legs, with no visible seams or decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the seat and backrest profile and the alignment of the legs.
